$description: Confetti design tokens, W3C DTCG format. One group per theme+mode; values are fully resolved (accessibility exceptions applied).

a16.$description: cream at 16% — the dark-mode counterpart to ink.a12

600.$description: canonical Ink — warm near-black, text and borders

300.$description: confetti brand Red, lifted enough to read AS TEXT on the dark surface (4.69:1)
brand, lifted enough to read AS TEXT on the forest dark surface

500.$description: Adventure brand green — reads as text on sand (4.8:1) and as button fill w/ white (6.6:1)

a12.$description: bark at 12% — subtle border on sand

600.$description: warm near-black — Adventure light-mode text and borders

a16.$description: sand at 16% — subtle border on forest

600.$description: deep magenta — brand AS TEXT on light

900.$description: neon light text / border — deep purple

600.$description: card

100.$description: neon dark text / border — light lavender

hard-ink.$description: hard offset shadow — the sticker lift, no blur

hard-cream.$description: dark-mode counterpart — light offset against dark surfaces

button-lift.$description: buttons do NOT lift — they brighten on hover instead

button-hover-brightness.$description: hover lightness multiplier for buttons that change lightness instead of lifting

subtle.$description: outer bound of the hand-placed sticker tilt — components scale this by a per-instance multiplier in -1..1

max.$description: outer bound of the hand-placed sticker angle

lift.$description: how far an interactive surface rises on hover

button-lift.$description: the hover transform on filled buttons — a lift, or rest (no move), per theme

hero.$description: container-query driven headline, above the fixed ramp

display.$description: hero only — fluid, sits above h1

h6.$description: meets body size — weight and family carry the distinction

sm.$description: 16px — inline with body and control labels

primary.$description: pine green — reads as text on sand (4.7:1) and as button fill with white (6.5:1)

on-subtle.$description: subtle tints are deep in dark mode — needs the light foreground
